title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Lucknow - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Lucknow - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Lucknow. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Lucknow:
IIM Lucknow is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow!
